## Installation

See **[INSTALL.md](https://github.com/majorsimon/midium/blob/main/INSTALL.md)** for full instructions.

### Quick start

| Platform | Download | Notes |
|----------|----------|-------|
| macOS | `Midium_*_macos.app.zip` | Unzip → self-sign → right-click Open ([details](https://github.com/majorsimon/midium/blob/main/INSTALL.md#macos)) |
| Linux | `*.AppImage` or `*.deb` | [details](https://github.com/majorsimon/midium/blob/main/INSTALL.md#linux) |
| Windows | `*-setup.exe` or `*.msi` | Run installer, click "More info → Run anyway" |

> **macOS users:** a one-time self-signing step is required for per-app volume
> control. See [INSTALL.md → macOS](https://github.com/majorsimon/midium/blob/main/INSTALL.md#macos).
